item.title:
nottmtails: Paul Taylor @nottmtails · 16s Looks like a back four for #NFFC - and it is a pretty strong team.
Williams, Aina, Muril
item.description:
Paul Taylor @nottmtails · 16s Looks like a back four for #NFFC - and it is a pretty strong team.
Williams, Aina, Murillo, Sangare, MGW, Hutchinson and Wood all start, with Ortega in goal.
Sels, Milenkovic, Jesus and Hudson-Odoi among the subs.
More of the big hitters involved than you'd expect, maybe. 3

item.title:
Everton: Everton @Everton · 26min Is right, @MeatballMolly !
Molly McCann will wear a unique #EFC-inspired robe and shorts for
Everton: Everton @Everton · 2min En respuesta a @Everton Born, not manufactured. 1 3 369
